reset_password.subtitle: Enter your new password.
reset_password.error_generic: Error resetting password. Please try again.

form.title: Record new service
form.error_time: End time must be after start time

table.no_entries: No entries for the selected filters.

expense_table.no_entries: No expenses for the selected filters.

employees.title: Employees
employees.name: Name
employees.delete_confirm: Really delete? All data will be removed.

add_employee.title: Add new employee
add_employee.name: Full name
add_employee.invite_hint: After adding, the person will automatically receive an invitation email with a link to set their own password.
add_employee.error: Error creating employee. Please try again.

general_steps.title: Log in
general_steps.text: Sign in with your email address and password. After login you will be automatically redirected to the correct dashboard.

general_steps.title: Switch language
general_steps.text: You can switch between German, English and Vietnamese at any time using the buttons in the top right.

general_steps.title: Use tabs
general_steps.text: The dashboard has two tabs: 'Income' for services rendered and 'Expenses' for costs and purchases.

general_steps.title: Export PDF
general_steps.text: Use the export button in the top right to download your entries as a PDF.

general_steps.title: Log out
general_steps.text: Click 'Logout' in the top right to securely sign out.

income_steps.title: Select date
income_steps.text: Today's date is pre-selected by default. You can adjust it manually.

income_steps.title: Enter time from/to
income_steps.text: Enter the start time – the end time is automatically set 1 hour later. You can adjust it afterwards.

income_steps.title: Choose category
income_steps.text: First select a category (e.g. Manicure, Pedicure, Face). The matching services will then appear.

income_steps.title: Choose service
income_steps.text: Select the service performed. The default price is filled in automatically.

income_steps.title: Adjust amount
income_steps.text: The amount is pre-filled but can be overwritten manually (e.g. for special prices).

income_steps.title: Choose payment method
income_steps.text: Select how the customer paid: Cash, Twint or Credit card.

income_steps.title: Edit entry
income_steps.text: Click on an existing entry in the table to edit or delete it.

expenses_steps.title: Date and amount
expenses_steps.text: Select the purchase date and enter the amount in CHF.

expenses_steps.title: Choose category
expenses_steps.text: Select the appropriate expense category (e.g. Materials, Cleaning, Marketing).

expenses_steps.title: Enter description
expenses_steps.text: Briefly describe the purpose of the expense. This field is required.

expenses_steps.title: Supplier (optional)
expenses_steps.text: Enter the name of the supplier or shop, e.g. 'Migros' or 'Amazon'.

expenses_steps.title: Upload receipt
expenses_steps.text: Upload a photo or PDF of the receipt. Use the 'Scan receipt' button to automatically extract the date, amount, supplier and description.

expenses_steps.title: Remove receipt
expenses_steps.text: If you selected the wrong file, click the X next to the filename to remove it.

expenses_steps.title: Edit entry
expenses_steps.text: Click on an existing entry in the table to edit it.

employees_steps.title: Open employee list
employees_steps.text: Click 'Employees' in the admin navigation to see the full list.

employees_steps.title: Add new employee
employees_steps.text: Click 'Add employee'. Fill in name, email address, password (twice) and role. Click 'Save' to create the account.

employees_steps.title: Deactivate employee
employees_steps.text: Click 'Deactivate' on the desired entry. The account is kept but the person can no longer log in.

employees_steps.title: Reactivate employee
employees_steps.text: Click 'Activate' on a deactivated entry to restore access.

employees_steps.title: Delete employee
employees_steps.text: The delete button permanently removes the account. All previous entries by that person remain in the database.

employees_steps.title: Reset password
employees_steps.text: Click 'Change password' to set a new password for an employee directly – without an email link.
